# Basic Speech Enhancement Model
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torchaudio

class SimpleSpeechEnhancer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, n_fft=512, hop_length=128):
        super().__init__()
        self.n_fft = n_fft
        self.hop_length = hop_length
        self.stft = torchaudio.transforms.Spectrogram(n_fft=n_fft, hop_length=hop_length, power=None)
        self.istft = torchaudio.transforms.InverseSpectrogram(n_fft=n_fft, hop_length=hop_length)
        
        # Simple convolutional layers for enhancement
        self.conv1 = nn.Conv2d(2, 32, kernel_size=3, padding=1)  # Real and imaginary parts
        self.conv2 = nn.Conv2d(32, 64, kernel_size=3, padding=1)
        self.conv3 = nn.Conv2d(64, 32, kernel_size=3, padding=1)
        self.conv4 = nn.Conv2d(32, 2, kernel_size=3, padding=1)  # Output real and imaginary parts
        
        self.relu = nn.ReLU()
        self.sigmoid = nn.Sigmoid()
        
    def forward(self, x):
        # x shape: (batch, length)
        # Apply STFT
        spec = self.stft(x)  # Complex tensor of shape (batch, freq_bins, time_frames)
        
        # Separate real and imaginary parts
        real_part = spec.real  # (batch, freq_bins, time_frames)
        imag_part = spec.imag  # (batch, freq_bins, time_frames)
        
        # Stack real and imaginary parts as channels
        spec_stacked = torch.stack([real_part, imag_part], dim=1)  # (batch, 2, freq_bins, time_frames)
        
        # Apply convolutions
        out = self.relu(self.conv1(spec_stacked))
        out = self.relu(self.conv2(out))
        out = self.relu(self.conv3(out))
        out = self.sigmoid(self.conv4(out))  # (batch, 2, freq_bins, time_frames)
        
        # Reconstruct complex spectrogram
        enhanced_real = out[:, 0, :, :] * real_part - out[:, 1, :, :] * imag_part
        enhanced_imag = out[:, 1, :, :] * real_part + out[:, 0, :, :] * imag_part
        enhanced_spec = torch.complex(enhanced_real, enhanced_imag)
        
        # Apply inverse STFT
        enhanced_audio = self.istft(enhanced_spec, length=x.shape[-1])
        
        return enhanced_audio
